{{Quote|Stare any harder and it'll evaporate.|Tolk le Trene teasing Jos Vondar, who was staring into his Tanque tea|<ref name="MedStar I" />}}
'''Tanque tea''' was a variety of [[Tea/Legends|tea]] with a murky appearance, which was due to root fragments that were one of its ingredients. Some of the root fragments floated at the surface of the tea and were visible to the unaided eye.<ref name="MedStar I" /> In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' to [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].</ref> a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Doctor/Legends|surgeon]] named [[Jos Vondar]] had Tanque tea in the chow hall of [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Republic Mobile Surgical Unit]] [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 7|7]], a medical facility located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. He shared the tea with his [[Nurse/Legends|nurse]] assistant, [[Tolk le Trene]], a member of the genetically Human [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdian]] race.<ref name="MedStar I" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tanque tea appeared in ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'', a [[2004]] [[Clone Wars multimedia project|''Clone Wars'']] novel written by [[Steve Perry]] and [[Michael Reaves]] as the first part of the ''[[MedStar Duology]]''.<ref name="MedStar I" />

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st}}
